title: Rubric-Friendly Example
description: Extra fields like rubric and expectedAnswer are allowed. The app ignores them, but an AI reviewer can use them after export.

tests.title: Photosynthesis Check
tests.instructions: Write clear answers. The exported Markdown can be reviewed against the rubric fields in this source JSON.

questions.expectedAnswer: Photosynthesis is the process plants, algae, and some bacteria use to convert light energy into chemical energy stored in sugars.
rubric: Mentions conversion to chemical energy or sugar
Identifies plants, algae, or some bacteria

questions.prompt: Which pair are major inputs of photosynthesis?
Why does photosynthesis matter for ecosystems?
rubric: Mentions oxygen or carbon dioxide when relevant
